text: Ok. There was a mouse who liked oranges. It ran everywhere and found them. It ate a few. It shared some with friends. It had a special nest for them. Not too far from there lived badgers who didn't like mice. One day, badger came to mouse nest. Mouse said nope. Badger said come out! Mouse hid. Badger dug burrow. Mouse saw burrow though wall. Mouse crawled right in. Badger smelled nest and dug. Mouse squeaked and came out. Badger dug hole! Saw mouse's paw prints. Badger followed. In nest saw fruit. Grabbed it. Mouse screamed. Badger dropped it. Mouse ate happily!<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
